loading.preparingDescription: In a few seconds we will open the guided assistant.
loading.stopDescription: The Brand Kit analysis was canceled.

toasts.nameUpdatedDescription: The brand kit name was updated successfully.
toasts.nameUpdateErrorDescription: The name could not be updated.
toasts.genericErrorDescription: An error occurred while updating the name.
toasts.duplicateErrorDescription: The current kit could not be duplicated.
toasts.manualCreateError: The manual Brand Kit could not be created.
toasts.createError: The Brand Kit could not be created.
toasts.duplicateCreateError: The kit copy could not be created.
toasts.duplicateSaveError: The kit copy could not be saved.
toasts.regenerateErrorDescription: The Brand Kit could not be regenerated.
toasts.regenerateUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while regenerating.
toasts.identifyCreatedError: The newly created Brand Kit could not be identified.
toasts.identifierErrorDescription: The Brand Kit cannot be saved because its ID is missing. Try reloading the page or regenerating it.
toasts.logoLimitDescription: You can only have up to 6 logos.

hero.welcomeDescription: Your brand kit is the foundation for getting consistent results in Image, Carousel, and Video.
hero.createDescription: Before generating content, spend a few minutes building a complete and coherent brand kit.
hero.helper: The better defined your brand kit is, the better every creation module will perform.
hero.socialWarningTitle: Social media URLs cannot be analyzed automatically
hero.socialWarningDescription: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and other social URLs do not allow automatic style extraction.
hero.noWebsite: I do not have a website, I will build my brand kit manually
hero.validUrlRequired: Enter a valid URL in the Brand Kit website field to analyze it.

loadingStages.capturingVisualEssence: Capturing the visual essence of the website...

dialogs.regenerateDescriptionBefore: This action will analyze the website
dialogs.regenerateWarning: Warning: all the manual changes you made in this profile will be permanently lost.
dialogs.deleteCurrentAfter: and this action cannot be undone.

progress.title: Brand Kit completeness
progress.complete: Your Brand Kit is ready to generate high-quality content.

context.title: Brand vision and context
context.placeholder: Describe your brand vision and context...

visualAssets.noExtraImages: No additional images were found on the site.
visualAssets.uploadNewImage: Upload new image to the kit

contact.title: Channels and direct contact
contact.subtitle: Official contact information detected on the website

board.howToCompleteDescription: Step 1: give your kit a name. Step 2 (optional): paste a URL and click Analyze URL to autofill content.
board.manualUrlHint: Your kit was created manually. Add a valid URL to complete it automatically.
board.validUrlHint: Valid URL. Click "Analyze URL" to update this kit with website data.
board.emptyUrlHint: If you add a valid URL, you can analyze it to complete this kit faster.
board.completeAssistantDescription: When you finish these steps, the full editor will unlock.
board.saveErrorDescription: The changes could not be synchronized with the database.
board.exportErrorDescription: The kit could not be exported in portable format.
board.readImageExportError: The image could not be read for export.
board.importCreateError: The kit could not be created for import.
board.importSaveError: The imported kit could not be saved.
board.importFileError: The Brand Kit file could not be imported.

palette.title: Color palette
palette.dragHint: Drag onto another color to swap roles

typography.title: Typography
typography.exploreDescription: You do not need to know font names. Browse examples and pick the one you like.

textAssets.title: Text assets
textAssets.description: Editable copy for campaigns and content generation
textAssets.analyzeErrorDescription: The file could not be processed.
textAssets.updatedDescription: The selected assets were added to your Brand Kit.

defaultData.brandContext: Full-rental country house in Rubielos de Mora, a medieval town. Relaxed and exclusive atmosphere.

tooltips.marketing_hooks: Impactful lines used as headlines in banners and ads for your brand.
tooltips.visual_keywords: Visual keywords that guide image generation.
tooltips.ctas: Action button copy that invites the user to do something.
tooltips.brand_context: Business description used to generate relevant content.

extraction.title: Assets extracted from file
extraction.description: AI analyzed your document. Select which elements you want to add to your Brand Kit.

wizard.basePreparedTitle: We prepared a base version of your kit from the website
wizard.basePreparedDescriptionA: In the next steps you will see logos, colors, copy, and other data detected automatically.
wizard.valuesDescription: Add the key values of your brand.
wizard.toneDescription: Choose the tone of voice of your brand.
wizard.optionalAnalyzeDescription: If you enter your website, we will try to extract logos, colors, typography, and copy automatically.
wizard.title: Brand Kit Assistant
wizard.closeAnytime: You can close this assistant whenever you want.

validUrlHint.before: The URL format is correct. You can click

noWebsiteHint.before: If you do not have a website yet, you can continue with

wizard.logosDropzone: Drag logos here or click to upload
wizard.noLogosYet: There are no logos yet. You can upload one or several.

textColorHint.after: color will be used for headlines and text inside generated images.

backgroundColorHint.after: color will be the main base tone in generated images.

wizard.swapColorRoles: Drag one color onto another to swap its role (Text, Background, or Accent).
wizard.ctasUsageHint: These lines will be used in buttons and closing phrases.
wizard.imagesReview: Review the detected images and upload any you want to keep in your kit.
wizard.analyzingWebsite: We are analyzing your website. This may take a few seconds.
wizard.previewUnavailable: We could not show the screenshot right now, but you can still confirm whether the URL is correct.
wizard.completionHint: This percentage grows with what you complete manually and with any auto-filled data extracted from the URL analysis.
wizard.completeAndContinue: Finish this assistant and you go straight to the editor.
wizard.reviewRole: Your role now is to review it: keep it as is, correct it, or add whatever is missing.
wizard.reviewLogos: Review the detected logos or upload your own.
wizard.contactIntro: Complete your contact details: email, phones, addresses, and social profiles.
wizard.brandContextIntro: Explain in a few lines what your brand does, who it serves, and what approach it follows.
wizard.typographyNoKnowledge: Don't worry if you do not know Google Fonts.
wizard.typographyIntro: Choose one font for headlines and another for paragraphs. You can test and change them at any time.
wizard.visualStylesDescription: Define visual styles for your pieces.
wizard.paletteIntro: Adjust your palette. Text, Background, and up to 5 accents.
wizard.previewError: We could not load a preview of this website.
wizard.minCompletionGate: Image and the rest of the modules stay locked until your kit is above 70%.
wizard.createNewTitle: Let's create a new brand kit
wizard.createNewDescription: We will guide you step by step so it is ready quickly.
wizard.brandNameIntro: Write the name of your brand.
wizard.readyEditorDescription: You can keep refining everything in the editor now.
wizard.missingCompletionGate: You still need {{missing}}% to reach the minimum {{minimum}}% and unlock Image.

analyzingMessages.opening: Opening the page in analysis mode...
analyzingMessages.hierarchy: Analyzing visual hierarchy and key blocks...
analyzingMessages.images: Looking for featured images and assets...
analyzingMessages.preparing: Preparing a base kit for you...

errors.analyzeUrl: We could not analyze the website. Check the URL and try again.

accentHint.before: Accent colors will be used to highlight key elements.

language.title: Preferred language
language.helper: This language will be used to generate content and brand suggestions.

audience.title: Target audience
audience.helper: These profiles were identified by AI after analyzing the brand language, offer, and positioning on the website.

assets.visualStylesDescription: Used for image generation in the Image module.
